violations.text: The following was observed: 1) Packages of instant coffee and chocolate bars were observed labeled in a different language. 2) Dates packaged on-site was observed without any labeling. Packaged food must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address in English. Food labeling guide and requirements left with person in charge. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
